sql_array: CREATE TABLE instances (id INT PRIMARY KEY, instance_name VARCHAR(255), region VARCHAR(255), status VARCHAR(50), access_key VARCHAR(255), sec_token VARCHAR(255), launch_time TIMESTAMP);

INSERT INTO instances (id, instance_name, region, status, access_key, sec_token) VALUES (1, 'my_instance_of_linux', 'us-west-2', 'stopped', 'AKIAJI7ZL427TI5EDF5A', 'CGI/UMaXf2LRUctaj/HGJ57UNy/t7fNCshh8wpJg');
CREATE TABLE logs (log_id INT PRIMARY KEY, instance_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, log_message VARCHAR(1000), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO logs (log_id, instance_name, log_message) VALUES (1, 'my_instance_of_linux', 'Instance started successfully.');
SELECT CONCAT('Starting instance: ', instance_name) AS message FROM instances WHERE status = 'stopped';
SELECT DB.DBA.AMAZON_START_INSTANCE ('AKIAJI7ZL427TI5EDF5A', (SELECT instance_name FROM instances WHERE id = 1), 'CGI/UMaXf2LRUctaj/HGJ57UNy/t7fNCshh8wpJg') AS result;
SELECT id, instance_name || ' - ' || status AS instance_status FROM instances WHERE access_key IS NOT NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC;
CREATE TABLE temp_records AS SELECT id, instance_name, (CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR) || 'Test') AS test_field FROM instances WHERE id < 10;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS num_logs FROM logs WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 DAY' HAVING num_logs > 0;
